title: Health essentials
description: Useful words for health, medicine, exercise, and healthcare.

items.meaning: to keep your body and mind in good condition
items.example: Regular exercise and sleep help people stay healthy.

items.meaning: to stop health problems before they begin
care provided by doctors or hospitals
items.example: Good medical treatment should be available to everyone.

items.meaning: a way of living that supports good health
items.example: A healthy lifestyle includes exercise and balanced meals.

items.meaning: a healthy emotional and psychological state
items.example: Work-life balance is important for mental well-being.

items.meaning: the ability to get medical help when needed
items.example: Access to healthcare should not depend only on income.
